title.data: What is Auto Payment or mandate registration?

children.data: Auto Payment or mandate registration is a digital method you can use to automate payments for your instalments, SIPs, bill payments, etc. Through Auto Payment, your bank receives a standing instruction to debit the instalment amount automatically on the due date.

title.data: How to set up Auto Payment or register e-mandate?

children.data: You can set up Auto Payment by selecting your loan or mandate account, providing your bank details, and authorizing the e-mandate via your Net Banking or Debit Card credentials.

If your current month's instalment is under presentation, the bank account change will apply from the subsequent month's instalment* (e.g. if it's Jan 29, deductions will start in March) *Subject to bank approval.
Check your reminder SMS from BFL to know which account will be used for upcoming deduction.
- If your current instalment is under presentation, then the Auto Payment change request will apply to your subsequent instalment and not the present one.
- Your bank may charge a one-time account registration fee.

title.data: What is an SDP AutoPay mandate?

children.data: An SDP AutoPay mandate allows automated monthly deductions from your registered bank account towards your Systematic Deposit Plan.

title.data: How do I change the deposit amount on my SDP?

children.data: To alter your monthly deposit amount, you must create a new Systematic Deposit Plan request or update the terms via the service request panel prior to the next billing cycle.
